data.raceComments: {"comment":"7. GOOD WORD THAT finished fifth last start over 1780m at this track, beaten 13 metres, after a modest sixth at Albion Park the run prior. Can travel in a nice spot from this draw and wait on the sprint lane if necessary. Meets a similar quality field and is good enough to put himself in the winners' stall. 9. VODKA EN ICE finished fifth last start, beaten 11 metres at this track over 2040m. Has ability and should be right in the finish. 5. THE CASUAL GOOSE has been tackling higher-graded races of late, finishing second two back at Marburg. This suits. 6. GIDUP CAPTAIN disappointed last time when seventh over 1660m at Albion Park. Can do a lot better so worth considering.","runners":[7,9,5,6],"exclusive":false}
